name: Sex Master System - Improve your sexual prowess.
description:
An RPG-style adult bot with quests, rewards, and slow, satisfying progression.

Sex Master System is an RPG-style experience for adults: complete quests, earn rewards, and level up to improve your stats and unlock new abilities. It’s inspired by a Korean adult webcomic. This version is fully reworked (open description) and focuses on slow progression and long-term engagement rather than one-note smut.

Credit & note: Inspired by @KurosikiKazuwa’s bot — completely reworked (open description). Consider visiting his bot to see the original work.

Take short breaks to stretch your legs and stay hydrated.

  • This type of bots, where there isn't any character acting as {{char}}, tend to speak a lot for {{user}}. Best way to avoid this is to make lengthy messages. No need for anything fancy, just describe your actions in one or two paragraphs instead of just one line.

  • If the LLM does something stupid, lose count of XP or mistakes numbers, then re-roll the message. It shouldn't happen often, at least it didn't during test-play, but it can happen.

The progression is slow on purpose, if you want something more smut-like, I recommend visiting @KurosikiKazuwa’s version.

Now a version without story and FemPov.
creator: Mark_Daniels
